## ResetRateLimitParams

<GenerationInfo sourceFile="packages/ratelimit/src/api.ts" sourceLine="30" packageName="@commandkit/ratelimit" />

Parameters for resetting a single key or scope-derived key.

```ts title="Signature"

    key?: string;
    scope?: RateLimitScope;
    userId?: string;

    channelId?: string;
    commandName?: string;
    keyPrefix?: string;
}
```
